channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Sam Altman wants to pay some lucky person $555,000 a year to look after OpenAI's AI - but obviously, all is not quite as it seems
item.description: OpenAI is hiring a new head to look after model abuse and safety for $555k plus equity, but it'll be high-stress.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Five things to watch in cybersecurity for 2026
item.description: The White House is expected to kick off 2026 with a new national cyber strategy. Here's what else we're watching in a consequential year for cyber. The post Five things to watch in cybersecurity for 2026 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: AI’s most important benchmark in 2026? Trust
item.description: In 2026 (and beyond) the best benchmark for large language models won’t be MMLU or AgentBench or GAIA. It will be trust—something AI will have to rebuild before it can be broadly useful and valuable to both consumers and businesses. Researchers identify several different kinds of AI trust.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: There's still no sign of the Nvidia RTX 5080 32GB despite rumors – and a fresh claim suggests a worrying possibility
item.description: Fresh rumors suggest Nvidia RTX 5080 32GB was initially set for cloud gaming only, and that's a worrying sign for any potential launch.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Opinion: EPA helping AI industry grow but ignoring technology’s power to protect environment
item.description: Agency must use artificial intelligence to defend communities with same zeal it applies to cutting protections that safeguard them.
item.dc:creator: Avi Garbow, The Mercury News

item.title: Chromium explained: How the open-source engine drives today’s browsers
item.description: 3 facts to know about Chromium Chromium provides the core engine, network stack, and architecture for Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and other major web browsers. The project’s code lineage traces back to 2001, forking from Apple’s WebKit.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Deepseek says new method can train AI more efficiently and cheaply
item.description: Chinese AI company Deepseek has unveiled a new training method, Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), which will make it possible to train large language models more efficiently and at lower cost, reports the South China Morning Post.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cloud costs now No. 2 expense at midsize IT companies behind labor
item.description: Midsize IT companies now spend huge percentages of their revenues on cloud services, driven by a growing number of AI workloads running in the cloud, according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How AI transforms agriculture in the rural world
item.description: It all started with a sewing machine. Ramón Álvarez de Arriba was one of the many Asturian immigrants who sought their fortunes in America in the 19th century.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: America can’t afford to hollow out its cyber defenses
item.description: Jaya Baloo, the co-founder and COO of AISLE, explains why cuts to CISA will harm the nation’s ability to protect against AI cyber threats. The post America can’t afford to hollow out its cyber defenses first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: How to unlock the power of ChatGPT
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. I’ve recently written about free, private AI tools and the best AI mobile apps.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Sunderland vs Man City live streams: How to watch Premier League 2025-26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: We'll show you how to watch Sunderland vs Man City live streams from anywhere in the world as Haaland and co look to continue their run of Premier League wins.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: How to share your estimated arrival time on iPhone and Android
item.description: ETA sharing on Apple Maps and Google Maps keeps contacts updated automatically while you drive safely. Learn step-by-step instructions for iPhone and Android.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch The Traitors UK season 4
item.description: Claudia Winkleman and her lavish wardrobe return to Ardross Castle for a new 12-episode civilian series. Here's how to watch The Traitors UK season 4 online.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: 47 awesome Android app discoveries from 2025
item.description: It’s the calm before the storm. Today, on New Year’s Day, we have a brief moment to pause and prepare — and set ourselves up for success. From a tech perspective, that means taking the time to clean up and optimize your smartphone setup.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: NIH wants 1 million Americans for a study
item.description: "We don't normally rank our findings, but access controls tend to drift to the top because that is the gate to the system," Charles Summers said. The post NIH wants 1 million Americans for a study — but first must close critical data security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: College Football Bowl Games Free Streams: TV Channels, Schedule & Preview for Orange, Rose and Sugar Bowl
item.description: As Orange, Rose and Sugar will see eight teams become four, here's how to watch College Football Bowl games 2025/26 for free and from anywhere in the world.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: From robovacs for small homes to a Roomba for your lawn, here are 4 things we can expect to see from iRobot – according to the CEO
item.description: Exclusive: There are some intriguing plans for the original robot vacuum brand following recent company takeover.
item.dc:creator: Ruth Hamilton, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Jools Holland's Annual Hootenanny 2025
item.description: Jools Holland welcomes a host of musical guests to see in the New Year. Here's how to watch Jools Holland's Annual Hootenanny 2025 online and from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: SoftBank expands AI infrastructure ambitions with $4B DigitalBridge acquisition
item.description: SoftBank Group has announced plans to acquire DigitalBridge Group, an asset manager specializing in digital infrastructure investments such as data centers, cell towers, and fiber networks, in a deal valued at $4 billion.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 22 tech luminaries we lost in 2025
item.description: As modern technologies such as artificial intelligence grab today’s headlines, it’s worth remembering that their foundations were being laid more than half a century ago by computer scientists, philosophers, psychologists, developers, entrepreneurs, and more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI looks for a new head of AI preparedness
item.description: OpenAI has announced that it is looking for a new Head of Preparedness, who will be responsible for anticipating and mitigating the risks and damages that its AI models can cause. As compensation, OpenAI is offering around $550,000 in annual salary, plus stock.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI app for finding local food
item.description: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI-powered social app that recommends restaurants through conversational search, now testing in San Francisco and New York.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
